# Teslys

> Teslys is a full-service Tesla car sharing platform that turns your Tesla into passive income. We handle rentals, cleaning, and 24/7 guest support so owners earn while they sleep.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Platform overview and registration.
- [Get Started](/get-started): How to list your Tesla and start earning.
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): Step-by-step explanation of the Teslys service.
- [About](/about): Company background and mission.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about hosting, payouts, insurance, and management.
- [Earnings Calculator](/earnings-calculator): Estimate monthly income for your Tesla model.
- [How Much Can I Earn](/how-much-can-i-earn): Real earning data and projections.
- [Military Program](/military): 85/15 split program for active-duty members.
- [Turo Management](/turo-management): Comparison and migration guide for Turo hosts.
- [Tesla Monthly Rental](/tesla-monthly-rental): Long-term Tesla rental information.
- [Tesla Rental Cost](/tesla-rental-cost): Pricing benchmarks for Tesla rentals.
- [Tesla Rental Near Me](/tesla-rental-near-me): Local Tesla rental availability.
- [Tesla Rental Insurance](/tesla-rental-insurance): Insurance coverage details.
- [Tesla Rental Statistics](/tesla-rental-statistics): Market data and trends.
- [Blog](/blog): Tesla car sharing tips, passive income strategies, and industry news.
- [Support](/support): Contact and help resources.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How Teslys handles user data.
- [Terms of Use](/terms): Service terms and conditions.
